templates.DEFINE: Define {input} in a compact way for a 4-line calculator OLED.
templates.EXPLAIN: Explain {input} simply in max 4 lines of 18 chars.
templates.SOLVE: Solve {input}. Show only key steps in max 4 OLED lines.
templates.FORMULA: Give the main formula for {input}. Max 4 OLED lines.
templates.CONVERT: Convert {input}. Return only the final result.
